summary: Implemented ADR 0278 on the live platform by converging the private Gotenberg runtime on `docker-runtime-lv3`, refreshing the authenticated `/v1/gotenberg` API gateway route, and verifying both health plus real Chromium and LibreOffice PDF renders from the guest-local service and the gateway-backed operator path. The successful replay used source commit `8613ecf8fa4b5f43124bcc404acb1d7fd1213b36`; protected mainline truth surfaces still wait for the exact-main integration step.

verification.check: Focused repo automation and validation slice
verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml pytest tests/test_gotenberg_runtime_role.py -q` returned `11 passed in 0.41s`; `make syntax-check-gotenberg` passed; `uvx --from pyyaml python scripts/ansible_scope_runner.py validate` passed; `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate` passed; `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/service_redundancy.py --service gotenberg` plus `--check-live-apply --service gotenberg` passed; `uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/standby_capacity.py --service gotenberg` approved the declared standby path; `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/service_completeness.py --service gotenberg` passed; `uvx --from pyyaml python scripts/interface_contracts.py --check-live-apply service:gotenberg` passed; and `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards` passed on the workstream tree.

verification.check: Pinned image contract and scan receipt
verification.observed: `config/image-catalog.json` now pins `docker.io/gotenberg/gotenberg:8.29.0@sha256:1c04b80fa1e1f42123258a3fe28e2260d52e267dec77c0da5eab4143540172d5`, and `receipts/image-scans/2026-03-30-gotenberg-runtime.json` records the accompanying Trivy scan with `critical=0` and `high=40` for the pinned linux/amd64 image.

`make converge-gotenberg` completed successfully from source commit `8613ecf8fa4b5f43124bcc404acb1d7fd1213b36` with recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=256 changed=113 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=28 rescued=1 ignored=0`; the successful transcript is recorded in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0278-converge-gotenberg-r5.txt`.

The guest-local health probe returned `{"status":"up"...}` from `http://127.0.0.1:3007/health`; the local Chromium render returned `pdf_magic=%PDF` and `pdf_bytes=18591`; and the local LibreOffice render returned `pdf_magic=%PDF` and `pdf_bytes=14003`, as captured in the `2026-03-30-ws-0278-local-*` evidence files.

Using the controller-local platform-context bearer token, `https://api.example.com/v1/gotenberg/health` returned `{"status":"up"...}`, and the authenticated Chromium gateway render returned `pdf_magic=%PDF` with `pdf_bytes=17101`, proving the governed `/v1/gotenberg` route is live.

`./scripts/validate_repo.sh generated-docs` now fails only because canonical truth is stale for protected mainline surfaces `changelog.md` and `versions/stack.yaml`, which must wait for the final exact-main integration step. `origin/main` also advanced again during this workstream, so the authoritative replay still needs to be repeated from the newest synchronized mainline before pushing `origin/main`.

notes: The successful branch-local replay only happened after fixing four defects uncovered by the live apply itself: direct `playbooks/gotenberg.yml` scope registration, role defaults resolving service topology from the hostvars scope, Docker bridge-network creation failing because `DOCKER-FORWARD` was absent on the guest, and Chromium HTML uploads requiring the multipart filename `index.html`.
The service stays intentionally private on `docker-runtime-lv3`; the supported authenticated operator path is the governed API gateway route `https://api.example.com/v1/gotenberg`.

Protected integration files remain intentionally untouched on this workstream branch. The final merge-to-main step still needs the newest `origin/main`, the exact-main replay, and the canonical release-surface updates before `versions/stack.yaml` can move.
